@bluesapphire Well by weird I mean it's a really nice love story interspersed with like... softcore porn. It's a little to brass for me.
Just finished Cashback, it ended itself quite well. good movie all in all, I think.
@bluesapphire On more viewing, I take it back. The movie is only moderately good. It'd be a great love movie if it wasn't so weird at points
@bluesapphire Cashback is pretty great so far, although it has weird moments. It compares well with You, Me, and Everyone we know.

In the intervening days, I keep catching myself observing and noting the myriad terrible things that happen every day. But then I remember that observing them is not enough, it might not even be useful, without the next step of figuring out what is to be done.

@simonw @allafarce @hondanhon the only thing standing between many smart geniuses I like and million dollar budgets is the touch of psychopathy necessary to ask for millions of dollars you don't need with a completely straight face and then shake someone's hand after

A few days ago @AlyssaRosenberg gave me some really important advice: It's not enough to point out where things are wrong, take the next step and figure out ways to fix it.

That is such a different paradigm for me, for news, for Twitter, and for interacting with the world.
